query:
SELECT 'daily_editorial' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM daily_editorial GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'startup_of_day', section, COUNT(*) FROM startup_of_day GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_reportage', section, COUNT(*) FROM weekly_reportage GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'market_analysis', section, COUNT(*) FROM market_analysis GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'breaking_news', section, COUNT(*) FROM breaking_news GROUP BY section
ORDER BY tbl, section;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT 'daily_editorial' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM daily_editorial GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'startup_of_day', section, COUNT(*) FROM startup_of_day GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_reportage', section, COUNT(*) FROM weekly_reportage GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'market_analysis', section, COUNT(*) FROM market_analysis GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'breaking_news', section, COUNT(*) FROM breaking_news GROUP BY section
ORDER BY tbl, section;
